Summary:
Experiment performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta
StartDate 2024-01-29
EndDate 2024-02-20
Channel beta
Branches {'name': 'control'} {'name': 'treatment-a'} {'name': 'treatment-b'} {'name': 'treatment-c'}
All
metric
branch All results compared against control.
uplift
effect size (mwu) Effect size calculated by Rank Biserial Correlation.
perf_page_load_time_ms Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.
treatment-a
-1.1%
None (p=0.01)
treatment-b
+1.1%
None (p=0.24)
treatment-c

Small (r=-0.01)

treatment-c
-1.6%
Small (r=-0.01)
perf_first_contentful_paint_ms The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.

Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta",
    "histograms": {
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from responseStart to loadEventStart for the foreground http or https root content document.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between responseStart and the first contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time spent during page load executing Javascript in ms.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between navigationStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "The time between responseStart and the largest contentful paint of a foreground http or https root content document, in milliseconds. The contentful paint timestamp is taken during display list building and does not include rasterization or compositing of that paint.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_response_start_ms": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "Time in milliseconds from navigationStart to responseStart.",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.http_page_open_to_first_received": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "HTTP page: Open -> first byte of reply received (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_dns_lookup_time": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "HTTP subitem: DNS lookup time (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_sent": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "HTTP subitem: Open -> first byte of request sent (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_received": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "HTTP subitem: Open -> first byte of reply received (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        },
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.http_subitem_first_byte_latency_time": {
            "glean": false,
            "desc": "HTTP subitem: Page start -> first byte received for subitem reply (ms)",
            "kind": "numerical"
        }
    },
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between firstContentfulPaint and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "load_time": {
            "desc": "Time between loadEventStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "lcp_time": {
            "desc": "Time between largestContentfulPaint and navigationStart, at the point of onLoad firing, in ms. This may differ from the final LCP value as reported through the LCP histogram.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 30000
        },
        "response_time": {
            "desc": "Time between responseStart and navigationStart, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        },
        "js_exec_time": {
            "desc": "Time spent executing JS during page load, in ms.",
            "min": 0,
            "max": 10000
        }
    },
    "segments": [
        "All",
        "Windows",
        "Linux",
        "Mac"
    ],
    "is_experiment": true,
    "startDate": "2024-01-29",
    "endDate": "2024-02-20",
    "channel": "beta",
    "branches": [
        {
            "name": "control"
        },
        {
            "name": "treatment-a"
        },
        {
            "name": "treatment-b"
        },
        {
            "name": "treatment-c"
        }
    ]
}
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  fcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  fcp_time >= 0 AND fcp_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  load_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  load_time >= 0 AND load_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'lcp_time') AS int) AS lcp_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  lcp_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  lcp_time >= 0 AND lcp_time <= 30000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  response_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  response_time >= 0 AND response_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with eventdata as (
SELECT
  normalized_os as segment,
  mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
  SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
FROM
  `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
CROSS JOIN
  UNNEST(events) AS event
WHERE
  normalized_channel = "beta"
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
  AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')  
  AND mozfun.map.get_key(ping_info.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
)
SELECT
  segment,
  branch,
  js_exec_time as bucket,
  COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
  eventdata
WHERE
  js_exec_time >= 0 AND js_exec_time <= 10000
GROUP BY
  segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
  segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"

SELECT

    SELECT

        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms, '$.values') as hist

        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"

        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),

SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT

    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_largest_contentful_paint_from_response_start_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_response_start_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_response_start_ms is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.http_page_open_to_first_received, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.http_page_open_to_first_received is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_dns_lookup_time, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_dns_lookup_time is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_sent, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_sent is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_received, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.http_sub_open_to_first_received is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
  

  with json_strings as (
    SELECT 
        normalized_os as segment,
        mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.http_subitem_first_byte_latency_time, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-29')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-20')
        AND normalized_channel = "beta"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.http_subitem_first_byte_latency_time is not null
        AND payload.processes.parent.scalars.browser_engagement_total_uri_count > 0
        AND mozfun.map.get_key(environment.experiments, "performance-metric-calibration-with-lcp-beta").branch is not null
),
keyValuePairs as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    json_strings,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    keyValuePairs
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
   segment, branch, bucket
